title: How do I update the GlobalProtect VPN client on a Mac?
plain_text: A Virtual Private Network (VPN) allows you to securely connect your computer to resources on the Northeastern University network. Many of the systems and services on the Northeastern University network require a secure connection for access. While on campus, NUnet and NUwave automatically provide a secure connection to campus network resources, such as the Q: drive. If you are not connected to NUnet or NUwave, you will need to use a VPN connection in addition to your internet connection to access Northeastern systems and services. Some resources require a VPN, in addition to being on NUnet or NUwave, as an added layer of security. Update GlobalProtect Note: During installation, the client will need to disconnect. Do not have any applications running that require the VPN for access. 1. When a GlobalProtect update is available, you will receive a pop-up window informing you that an update is available. Select Yes to download the update in the background. 2. Select Yes to finish. When downloaded, a new window will come up asking if you want to install it now. Select the option convenient to you. 3. Reconnect to the VPN after installation.
body_html:
A Virtual Private Network (VPN) allows you to securely connect your computer to resources on the Northeastern University network. Many of the systems and services on the Northeastern University network require a secure connection for access. While on campus, NUnet and NUwave automatically provide a secure connection to campus network resources, such as the Q: drive. If you are not connected to NUnet or NUwave, you will need to use a VPN connection in addition to your internet connection to access Northeastern systems and services. Some resources require a VPN, in addition to being on NUnet or NUwave, as an added layer of security.

Update GlobalProtect

Note: During installation, the client will need to disconnect. Do not have any applications running that require the VPN for access.

  • When a GlobalProtect update is available, you will receive a pop-up window informing you that an update is available. Select Yes to download the update in the background.
  • Select Yes to finish. When downloaded, a new window will come up asking if you want to install it now. Select the option convenient to you.
  • Reconnect to the VPN after installation.

If you are not connected to NUnet or NUwave, you will need to use a VPN connection in addition to your internet connection to access Northeastern systems and services. Some resources require a VPN, in addition to being on NUnet or NUwave, as an added layer of security.
